owns: T’au agent handoff JSON rendering contract
External subagent receipt intake and dry-run GitHub projection contract
Proof boundaries for UX Lab integration

fail_closed_rules: Do not fabricate a Memory product when a route endpoint fails.
Do not emit a GitHub/subagent handoff when a required Memory product is missing.
Do not answer from unsupported Memory intent actions.

proves: UX Lab can render and exercise the T’au chat contract as an integration viewer.
Successful browser routes can preserve the T’au handoff JSON contract through dry-run projection.
Mocked route checks remain labeled mocked and do not upgrade live Memory confidence.
does_not_prove: Actual external subagent execution from the browser chat.
Ownership of the canonical T’au UX contract by UX Lab.
